hallway.name: Dusty hallway
hallway.description: This Long,narrow passage is lined with cobweb-covered portraits.The marbleends here,replaced by rough wood. An exit leads back east

items.name: Heavy Statue
items.description: A very heavy statue that sits in the corner of the hallway

libary.name: grand libary
libary.description: Edwin believed knowledge could be preserved forever if the room itself remembered it.  A single book brand new catches your eye

items.name: Brand new book
items.description: The books leather cover is barely worn, unlike the others. Its spine is warm to the touch, as if it has been handled recently.

items.name: libary key
items.description: A small brass key, A tiny engraving of a desk drawer is etched into its bow.

kitchen.name: kitchen
kitchen.description: A large kitchen with pots and pans hanging from the ceiling. A long wooden table sits in the center of the room.The smell of old food lingers in the air.

items.name: Rusty Knife
items.description: An old knife with a rusty blade. It looks sharp enough to cut through something soft.

items.name: Stale Bread
items.description: A loaf of bread that has gone stale. It is hard and dry to the touch.

staircase.name: grand staircase
staircase.description: A grand staircase leading to the upper floors of the house. The steps creak underfoot.

second_hallway.name: Upstairs hallway
second_hallway.description: A narrow hallway with doors on either side. The walls are lined with old portraits.
